frost_filter.description: Speckle reduction for SAR intensity imagery using Frost adaptive filtering.

input.label: Input SAR raster path (or typed raster object).

radius.label: Local window radius in pixels (default 2). Larger windows smooth more aggressively but may blur fine edges.

damping_factor.label: Frost damping factor (default 2.0). Higher values suppress speckle more strongly with stronger decay weighting.

output.label: Output filtered raster path [optional]. If omitted, output remains in memory.

gamma_map_filter.description: Gamma-MAP speckle filter for SAR imagery with ENL-aware noise modeling.

input.label: Input SAR raster path (or typed raster object).

enl.label: Equivalent number of looks (ENL) (default 1.0). Increase if input is multilooked to avoid over-smoothing.

kuan_filter.description: Kuan adaptive speckle filter for SAR intensity data.

input.label: Input SAR raster path (or typed raster object).

sar_coregistration.description: Coregister moving SAR imagery to a reference grid (translation/affine/local-offset-grid modes).

reference_sar.label: Reference SAR raster path (direct mode). Required unless reference_sar_bundle is provided.

reference_sar_bundle.label: Reference SAR bundle root/archive [optional]. Use for sensor-package workflows.

moving_sar.label: Moving SAR raster to align (direct mode). Required unless moving_sar_bundle is provided.

coreg_mode.label: Coregistration model {translation, affine, local_offset_grid} (default translation). Use translation first for robustness.

max_offset_px.label: Maximum searched shift in pixels (x/y). Increase for poorly aligned pairs; larger values increase runtime.

sar_interferogram_coherence.description: Estimate interferometric coherence between SAR acquisitions (direct, complex, or bundle modes).

sar_analysis_readiness.description: Evaluate SAR scene readiness for downstream analysis, including optional terrain and pairwise coherence-proxy checks.

input_sar.label: Input SAR intensity raster (direct mode). Required unless input_sar_bundle is provided.

input_measurement_key.label: Measurement key for input bundle [optional]. Needed when bundle contains multiple assets.

input_dem.label: DEM raster for terrain normalization support [optional but recommended in rugged terrain].

pair_sar.label: Second SAR raster for coherence-proxy estimate [optional].

pair_sar_bundle.label: Second SAR bundle path for coherence-proxy estimate [optional].

pair_measurement_key.label: Measurement key for second SAR bundle [optional].

input_look_angle_deg.label: Input look/incidence angle in degrees [optional]. Improves readiness interpretation for geometry-sensitive analyses.

remote_sensing_change_detection.description: Detect spectral change between baseline and change-date multispectral bundles with profile-based sensitivity.

intermediate_ndvi.label: Intermediate-date NDVI raster [optional]. Improves temporal validation of gradual changes.

profile.label: Detection profile {aggressive, balanced, conservative} (default balanced). Aggressive finds subtle change with more false positives.
